heading: Graphics packages I built, not just ran.
sub: Lower-thirds, scorebugs, idents and transitions authored from scratch in vMix GT Title Designer and deployed across live esports broadcasts.

items.title: Player lower-third system
items.caption: Animated player intro lower-third with auto-swap data binding.

items.title: Match scorebug
items.caption: Live score, round timer and series bracket bound to a data source.

items.title: Show ident / bumper
items.caption: Show-open ident animated in, then handed to GT for live titling.

note: Swap each item's media key for a GIF/WebM in /public/work (e.g. gt-lower-third.webm) or a JPG fallback of the same name. Add more items to taste.
